tagline: Your AI tax advisor for Naija, 2026.
aboutBody: Mai Filer na AI app for tax wahala for Naija. She go ask you question, read your papers, calculate your tax, explain every naira, and prepare the file wey NRS dey need. E be like TurboTax and TaxSlayer — but born for the age of AI.

chat.title: Talk with Mai Filer
chat.subtitle: Your tax, through conversation.
chat.placeholder: Ask Mai anytin — your payslip, PIT, relief, next step…
chat.emptyHint: Try: "I dey earn ₦5,000,000 every year. Wetin be my PIT for 2026?"

identity.title: Confirm say na you
identity.subtitle: We go check your NIN with licensed aggregator before we prepare any file.
identity.ninHelper: Na 11 digits. We no dey keep your raw NIN — na only encrypted copy wey we hash.
identity.nameLabel: Full name (the way you want am for the return)
identity.nameHelper: We go match am with the NIN record and show you if any name no gel.
identity.consentBody: I gree make Mai Filer check the NIMC record for this NIN to help my tax file. I sabi say my NIN go dey encrypted and say audit record for this consent go dey kept.
identity.resultNotVerified: We no fit verify this NIN
identity.nameMatchStrict: The name correspond with NIN record well-well.
identity.nameMatchFuzzy: The name close to the NIN record.
identity.nameMatchMismatch: The name no match with NIN record. Check am well before you file.

ngo.title: NGO annual return
ngo.subtitle: Record your exempt body's income, expenditure, and WHT remitted. Placeholder statutory rules apply; confirm before filing.
ngo.placeholderBanner: This form uses illustrative 2026 NRS rules pending owner confirmation. Do not file the pack until `ngo_rules.py` is replaced with confirmed values.
ngo.exemptionDeclaration: Trustees affirm the organisation continues to meet the tax-exempt criteria for this year.
ngo.signatoryDeclaration: Authorised signatory affirms this return is true and complete.

sme.title: SME calculators (preview)
sme.subtitle: Live CIT, WHT, and UBL 3.0 envelope validation against the placeholder statutory tables.
sme.placeholderBanner: Illustrative 2026 rules — the owner must supply confirmed NRS CIT bands, WHT rates, and the 55-field UBL list before this surface is used for real filings.
sme.ublHelp: Paste a full envelope JSON to validate against the 8-section / 55-field invariant.

dashboard.title: Your Mai Filer dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Year by year tax history, anything wey change, and mid-year tips.
dashboard.factsEmpty: No facts yet. After you file (or simulate), Mai go save the main numbers here so next year start with context.
dashboard.anomaliesEmpty: No big year-to-year change we fit see.
dashboard.nudgesEmpty: Nothing to flag for your current pace. Check back after the next payslip or invoice.
